content.full_text:
May 4, 2010

Trent Benedetti, CPA
2151 S. College Drive, Suite 101
Santa Maria, CA 93455-1304

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-070

Dear Mr. Benedetti:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on April 28, 2010.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Sandy Johnson
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division

SJ:jgl
